recommendations.title: Butterflies
recommendations.overview: Three strangers with one thing in common — the same father — come to a Turkish village to bury him, and learn about him and each other.

recommendations.title: Omen IV: The Awakening
recommendations.overview: Damien Thorn is dead, but his prophecy is reborn in a mysterious girl named Delia, who is adopted by two attorneys.

recommendations.title: Eternity
recommendations.overview: Valentine marries at the end of the 19th century, and love passes through her family from generation to generation.

recommendations.title: With Every Heartbeat
recommendations.overview: After they meet at their parent's engagement party, Mia and Frida are intrigued by and attracted to one another, despite Mia's own upcoming engagement to Tim. Mia must decide whether to continue her life with Tim or to follow her heart with Frida.

recommendations.title: Badhaai Ho
recommendations.overview: A 25-year-old man tries to suppress his embarrassment when his mother announces that she is pregnant.

recommendations.title: Almanya: Welcome to Germany

recommendations.title: Lars and the Real Girl
recommendations.overview: Extremely shy Lars finds it impossible to make friends or socialize. His brother and sister-in-law worry about him, so when he announces that he has a girlfriend he met on the Internet, they are overjoyed. But Lars' new lady is a life-size plastic wo

recommendations.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training

recommendations.title: Misericordia
